partners.name: Synchrotron Light Research Institute (Public Organization)
partners.description: Synchrotron Light Research Institute (SLRI) is a public organization under the Ministry of Higher Education, Science, Research and Innovation of Thailand. SLRI operates the Siam Photon Source (SPS), a synchrotron light source that provides high-intensity X-rays for scientific research in various fields, including physics, chemistry, materials science, and biology.

partners.name: National Astronomical Research Institute of Thailand (Public Organization)
